opinion: Norms regarding gender and sexual preference are nothing more than oppressive social tools; it's time we respond to any suppression with lethal force.
Recognize gender as a social construct and eliminate its use in legal, administrative, and institutional settings.

The government should mandate gender-affirming protections and care, fully fund transition-related services, minors can make autonomous decisions on transitioning, integrate LGBTQ+ history and gender theory as core components of K–12 education.

Protect same-sex marriage and federal anti-discrimination laws, support access to gender-affirming care with parental involvement for minors, allow trans women to compete in women’s sports, and involve parents in school curriculum decisions.

The government should remain neutral on matters of gender identity and sexual orientation, protecting equal treatment under the law (including same-sex relationships) while leaving cultural norms, education content, and family decisions largely to parents, communities, and individuals.

Ban gender-affirming care with federal funding, restrict biological males from female sports. Separate category for transitioned individuals. Same-sex marriage should be returned to the states. Schools should not teach gender propaganda.

Gender is immutable, binary, and biologically determined. The state should recognize only traditional sex categories, deny legal recognition to same-sex marriage, and prohibit medical gender transition.

Ban all public LGBTQ+ expression, purge non-traditional gender and sexuality content from public institutions, criminalize non-conforming identities, and subject violations to severe state-sanctioned punishment.
LGBTQ+ people are subhuman degenerates and a threat to society who should be converted immediately or eliminated.
